Patch Set 2:

Hi Andreas,

While I trying to port the following patches in 3.10-rhel7.6.series to 4.18-rhel8.series, they have conflicts. Could you please suggest which ones are required for RHEL 8.0 kernel 4.18.0 so that I can try to resolve the conflicts?

 - raid5-mmp-unplug-dev-rhel7.6.patch
 - dev_read_only-3.7.patch
 - blkdev_tunables-3.9.patch
 - vfs-project-quotas-rhel7.patch
 - fix-integrity-verify-rhel7.patch
 - fix-sd-dif-complete-rhel7.patch
 - block-integrity-allow-optional-integrity-functions-rhel7.patch
 - block-pass-bio-into-integrity_processing_fn-rhel7.patch

Patch Set 7:

Can we drop the raid5-mmp patch since its not correct. This is something we should resolve at some point. The blkdev tunables patch can also be dropped since Bull showed in LU-20 that the patches have no benefit. Also note sanity test 802a will fails since it only works when the kernel is patched with the old dev-rdonly patch. That test needs to be addressed as well.

Patch Set 7:

Thank you James. I'll update the patch.

Patch Set 7:

The "rdonly_dev" implementation in lustre/osd-zfs/osd_handler.c does not need the dev_read_only-*.patch, so the snapshot_mount codes will not be affected because snapshot support in Lustre is limited to ZFS OSDs.

I'll change sanity test 802a to work only with ZFS.

Patch Set 7:

DCO-8374 and DCO-8388 were resolved.

This patch needs to be based on ZFS 0.8.1 patch https://review.whamcloud.com/34951 so as to resolve the following issue:

ERROR: ambiguous python shebang in /usr/src/zfs-0.7.13/tests/test-runner/cmd/test-runner.py: #!/usr/bin/python. Change it to python3 (or python2) explicitly.

parents.subject: LU-11729 obdclass: align to T10 sector size when generating guard

commit.subject: LU-12269 kernel: RHEL 8.0 server support
commit.message:
LU-12269 kernel: RHEL 8.0 server support

This patch makes changes to support RHEL 8.0 release
for Lustre server.

The ldiskfs patch series was added by commit
5f7bd9a806d5ba5b0e70ae1b299a9b9a87fcc0a6.

Test-Parameters: trivial \
envdefinitions=SANITY_EXCEPT="421a 817" \
clientdistro=el8 serverdistro=el8 \
testlist=sanity

Change-Id: I6380c6cb6280e49bd1b193a639f1c5cd6f4e7ef1
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/35665
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Wang Shilong <wshilong@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Yang Sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
